message:
🐛 Fix update settings stall and OAuth spinner (#2099)

- Backend: broadcast "Already up to date" WebSocket message when no
  update is needed instead of silently returning. This prevents the
  frontend from being stuck waiting for progress messages.
- Frontend: add 30s stall timeout for the triggered state — auto-fails
  if no WebSocket progress arrives after clicking Update Now.
- Frontend: replace OAuth backend polling (infinite retry loop when
  backend is down) with instant useAuth().isAuthenticated check.
- Frontend: clear stale "Could not reach kc-agent" errors on
  successful fetchAutoUpdateStatus response.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
